findings.detail: The auditor flagged old untracked external lab artifacts in the working tree. They are not part of the scoped commit set and are not staged for this UI contour.
The dedicated browser smoke artifact was created after the initial audit snapshot and is now present as ui_web_overview_parity_repair_browser_smoke_2026-05-14.json.
The initial auditor confirmed action names and dispatch shape remained unchanged.
The initial auditor found no runtime, server, adapter, or command semantics changes in the tracked diff.

checked_scope: new overview parity repair audit artifacts

scoped_commit_rule: Stage only the UI/test/audit/screenshot files created or modified by this contour. Do not stage the known untracked external lab tail.
resume_from_here: Write closeout, run final scans, stage scoped files only, commit, and push.
